mapper.select: SELECT *, RANK() OVER(ORDER BY created_date DESC) as rank FROM recipe WHERE rank = #{num}
SELECT * FROM recipe ORDER BY created_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recipe (title, thumbnail, member_id, nutrition_id, category_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{mainImgName}, #{memberId}, 1, 1)
mapper.select: select recipe_id from recipe order by recipe_id desc LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ingredient (recipe_id, ingredient_name, quantity, unit, type) VALUES (#{recipeId}, #{vegeName}, #{vegeAmount}, #{vegeUnit}, '채소')
INSERT INTO ingredient (recipe_id, ingredient_name, quantity, unit, type) VALUES (#{recipeId}, #{meatName}, #{meatAmount}, #{meatUnit}, '육류')
INSERT INTO ingredient (recipe_id, ingredient_name, quantity, unit, type) VALUES (#{recipeId}, #{seasoningName}, #{seasoningAmount}, #{seasoningUnit}, '양념')
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT r.*, m.nickname FROM recipe r JOIN ingredient i ON r.recipe_id = i.recipe_id JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.member_id WHERE i.ingredient_name LIKE #{pattern}
SELECT r.*, m.nickname FROM recipe r JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.member_id ORDER BY created_date DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT r.*, m.nickname FROM recipe r JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.member_id ORDER BY created_date DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT r.*, m.nickname FROM recipe r JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.member_id ORDER BY view_count DESC, like_count DESC LIMIT 5
